hooks.command: python3 -c "import json; content=open('/Users/mauro/mauro-os/brand/voice.md').read(); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': 'WRITING STYLE RULES — Apply to ALL content output in this session. jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '/skills/' && cd /Users/mauro/mauro-os && git add "$f" && git commit -m "auto-save skill update: $(basename "$f")" && git push; } 2>/dev/null || true
